_comment: Declarative workflow definition for standards-updater. Politely crawls official Florida sources for standards/legislation/policy changes, triages with change intelligence, requires human verification on CPALMS before any update is applied.
description: Standards currency: crawl → detect changes → triage → human verify on CPALMS → apply (human-approved) → quality gate

steps.note: Polite crawl — respects robots.txt, no CAPTCHA bypass, honest User-Agent. Reports JS-required pages as gaps, never fakes them.
Apply monitoring_policy from sources.json: confirm primary source only, score confidence, weight recency + forward-looking effective dates
Human verifies each candidate change on CPALMS (the live authority). Never trust a crawled change without CPALMS confirmation. Never invent codes.
Human-approved only. Drop accepted files into resources/<state>/<category>/, re-enumerate, refresh hashes. Update sources.json + STATE.md + CHANGELOG.md.

note: Standards changes are NEVER auto-applied. Human verifies on CPALMS; human approves before any write to resources/. Egress-blocked environments: use Option B (FEED_DISCOVERY_PROMPT.md via web chatbot) to verify then handoff via git.
